prompt: Read the product.yaml at core/components/recipes/plan-roadmap/evals/fixtures/product.yaml. This is a LOCKED product artifact for Meridian OS. Derive 3-6 IDD epics from this product. Each epic must reference a strategic goal from product.yaml, have IDD fields (intent with p1/p2/p3, constraints, success_scenarios, failure_conditions), and use F-IDs (F1, F2, etc.). Write the output epics YAML to the outputs directory.
